retry_reason: Failure means the device is not present in either list; retrying without adding the device will keep failing.
contract_summary: Lookup-and-get wrapper: finds a pcie_device by wwid under pcie_device_lock and returns it with an incremented refcount (via pcie_device_get). The caller must hold pcie_device_lock and must release the returned reference using a corresponding pcie_device_put when done. If the device is not found (NULL), the caller must not attempt to use the pointer. Retrying may succeed if the device is later added, but the function does not create the device.
